name: FN57 | 银白石英
descriptionEn: Highly accurate and armor-piercing, the pricy Five-Seven is a slow-loader that compensates with a generous 20-round magazine and forgiving recoil. It has been painted with metallic paint and uses a crystallizing mask to create a pattern. Everyone wants to make an impact
descriptionZh: 拥有极高的精准度，能穿透护甲，价格昂贵的 FN57 换弹时间较慢，作为补偿，它具有设计巧妙的 20 发子弹和较低的后坐力。 枪身涂有金属质感喷漆并使用结晶模具压印图案。 谁都想做弄潮儿
